_doc: requests-clean — negative-corpus fixture. python-requests is the canonical Python HTTP library, audited and used in millions of projects. The 4 entries below are info-severity broken-marker (TODO/FIXME) emissions verified to be legitimate developer comments in the upstream source — they are NOT engine FPs but they define the noise floor. Future engine changes that add NEW emissions beyond these will surface as precision regressions.
